title: Burn's Leaf Litter
description: Now fallen leaves actually look like it. A small resourcepack that restores the color of leaves in litter
body:
## Burn's Leaf Litter
A small resourcepack that recolors the leaf litter to be green.

The vanilla leaf litter looks a bit poo (literally) and so in it's place, this resourcepack instead changes the color to make it more green. The color also updates based on biome!

![Leaf Litter! With Shaders!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a977365b033af4813720f9018997061ed6140d8.png)
